## 4. UI Specification

### Layout

- Uses `tool-layout.tsx` (shared header, ad slots, footer)
- Mobile-first, single-column on mobile, two-column on desktop (inputs left, outputs right)
- Inputs section: shadcn Form components with real-time validation
- Output section: results update instantly on input change (no submit button)

### Components Needed

| Component | Source | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| [component] | [shadcn/custom/existing] | [any special behavior] |

### Responsive Breakpoints

- Mobile (<768px): single column, inputs stacked above output
- Desktop (>=768px): side-by-side layout

## 5. SEO Requirements

### Meta Tags

```
title: "[Tool Name] - Free Online [Category] | FileFree Tools"
description: "[150 chars describing what the tool does and why it's useful]"
canonical: "https://[domain]/[slug]"
```

### JSON-LD (StructuredData)

```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "WebApplication",
  "name": "[Tool Name]",
  "applicationCategory": "[FinanceApplication/UtilitiesApplication/etc]",
  "operatingSystem": "Any",
  "offers": {
    "@type": "Offer",
    "price": "0",
    "priceCurrency": "USD"
  }
}
```

### Internal Links

- Link to other trinket tools in the footer
- Cross-sell CTA: "[Relevant FileFree/LaunchFree pitch]"

---

## 6. Monetization

### Ad Placement

- [ ] Top banner (below header, above tool)
- [ ] Sidebar (desktop only, right column)
- [ ] Bottom (below results, above footer)
- [ ] None (brand-building only)

### Cross-Sell CTA

**Text**: "[e.g., 'Planning your finances? File your taxes for free with FileFree.']"
**Link**: [filefree.ai or launchfree.ai]
**Placement**: Below results section

## 9. Launch Checklist

- [ ] Tool functions correctly on mobile and desktop
- [ ] SEO meta tags and JSON-LD verified
- [ ] AdSense slots configured (if applicable)
- [ ] Cross-sell CTA links to correct product
- [ ] Internal links to other trinket tools
- [ ] Lighthouse score >90
- [ ] Sitemap updated
- [ ] Analytics events firing (page view, tool use, CTA click)
